description_long: This is a small, slender potted plant with several elongated, pointed green leaves sprouting from thin, upright stems. The leaves are arranged sparsely, with each leaf attached to a separate branch, giving the plant an airy and delicate appearance. The stems are light green and appear flexible, supporting the leaves at various heights and angles. There is no visible pot or container in the images, suggesting the focus is solely on the plant itself. The overall structure is vertical and open, with ample space between the leaves and stems. The plant's minimalist form makes it suitable for modern urban environments where subtle greenery is desired.
description: A delicate, slender potted plant with sparse, pointed green leaves on thin upright stems. The plant has an airy, minimalist appearance.
description_view_0: The plant is seen from the front, showing three main stems with leaves at different heights and angles.
description_view_1: A side view reveals the separation between the stems and the thinness of the plant, with leaves extending outward.
description_view_2: The back view highlights the vertical alignment of the stems and the broad surfaces of the leaves.
description_view_3: Another side view, showing the staggered arrangement of the leaves and the open spaces between stems.
